general.name: mos_target_design_mode
general.description: The parameters for the metrics that descirbe a given Design Mode, where a Design Mode constrains the assignments on a design.

surveys.name: BHM
surveys.description: An optical time-domain spectroscopic survey of quasars and X-ray sources

surveys.name: MWM
surveys.description: A time-domain, optical+IR spectroscopic survey of Milky Way stars of all types.

general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_design_mode.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
